positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a crescent moon cradling a cluster of geometric celestial bodies, including planets and shooting stars, rendered in deep sapphire blue and metallic gold line art on a matte black background. The composition is centrally balanced, featuring clean, sharp silhouettes and intricate, elegant detailing. Use a linocut or engraved woodcut style with high contrast and crisp edges. The overall aesthetic should be celestial, mystical, and modern, suitable for apparel printing.
negative: photorealistic, messy, watercolor, grainy, noise, blur, amateur, artifacts, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy
